actionCalls.description: Calls an action that gets service point details for a specified address from an external service.
actionCalls.name: GetServicePointsByAddress
actionCalls.label: Get Service Points by Address

assignments.description: Sets the field values for the AddressRecord record variable and adds it to the AddressRecordList record collection.
assignments.name: AddAddressRecordToCollection
assignments.label: Add Address Record to Collection

assignments.description: Adds the BillingAccountObj record variable to the BillingAccounts record collection.
assignments.name: AddBillingAccountToCollection
assignments.label: Add Billing Account to Collection

assignments.description: Adds the annual and monthly consumption period names to the ConsumptionPeriodList collection.
assignments.name: AddConsumptionPeriodsToCollection
assignments.label: Add Consumption Periods to Collection

assignments.description: Adds the payment method attribute code to the PriceImpactingAttributesList collection.
assignments.name: AddPriceImpactingAttributesToCollection
assignments.label: Add Price-Impacting Attributes to Collection

assignments.description: Adds the current service point record from the loop to the FinalServicePointList record collection.
assignments.name: AddServicePointToFinalCollection
assignments.label: Add Service Point to Final Collection

assignments.description: Initializes the consumption category collection.
assignments.name: AddToConsumptionCategoryCollection
assignments.label: Add to Consumption Category Collection

assignments.description: Sets the selected data from OrderSummary page into the respective params to pass it to the backend.
assignments.name: EnrolmentDetailsExistingCustomer
assignments.label: Enrolment Details - Existing Customer

assignments.description: Initializes the ConsumptionInfo Apex-defined variables for the actual usage category.
assignments.name: InitializeActualUsageConsumptionInfo
assignments.label: Initialize Actual Usage Consumption Info

assignments.description: Initializes the ConsumptionCategory Apex-defined variables for the dual-fuel category.
assignments.name: InitializeDualFuelConsumptionCategory
assignments.label: Initialize Dual-Fuel Consumption Category

assignments.description: Initializes the ConsumptionCategory Apex-defined variables for the electricity category.
assignments.name: InitializeElectricityConsumptionCategory
assignments.label: Initialize Electricity Consumption Category

assignments.description: Initializes the ConsumptionCategory Apex-defined variables for the gas category.
assignments.name: InitializeGasConsumptionCategory
assignments.label: Initialize Gas Consumption Category

assignments.description: Initializes the ConsumptionInfo Apex type for the high consumption and dual-fuel category.
assignments.name: InitializeHighDualFuelConsumptionInfo
assignments.label: Initialize High Dual-Fuel Consumption Info

value.stringValue: Gas: Approx 17,000 Kwh, Electricity: Approx 4,800 kWh (4 bedrooms and above)
Gas: Approx 1417 Kwh, Electricity: Approx 400 kWh (4 bedrooms and above)

High dual fuel consumption homes are 4+ BHKs 
Large family or shared accommodation 
1200+ sqft 
Gas for heavy central heating, long showers, frequent cooking 
Electricity for multiple ACs, TVs, fridge, washing machine, dishwasher, water heater

assignments.description: Initializes the ConsumptionInfo Apex-defined variables for the high electricity consumption category.
assignments.name: InitializeHighElectricityConsumptionInfo
assignments.label: Initialize High Electricity Consumption Info

value.stringValue:
High consumption homes are 4+ BHKs 
Large family or shared accommodation 
1200+ sqft 
Appliances include multiple ACs, TVs, fridge, washing machine, dishwasher, water heater

assignments.description: Initializes the ConsumptionInfo Apex-defined variables for the high gas consumption category.
assignments.name: InitializeHighGasConsumptionInfo
assignments.label: Initialize High Gas Consumption Info

value.stringValue:
High gas consumption homes are 4+ BHKs 
Large family or shared accommodation 
1200+ sqft 
Heavy use of central heating, long showers, frequent cooking 
Poorer insulation or older boiler systems

assignments.description: Initializes the ConsumptionInfo Apex type for the low consumption and dual-fuel category.
assignments.name: InitializeLowDualFuelConsumptionInfo
assignments.label: Initialize Low Dual-Fuel Consumption Info

value.stringValue: Gas: Approx 8,000 Kwh, Electricity: Approx 1,800 kWh (smaller 1 or 2 bedrooms)
Gas: Approx 666 Kwh, Electricity: Approx 150 kWh (smaller 1 or 2 bedrooms)

Low dual fuel consumption homes are 1/2 BHKs 
Regularly empty on weekdays 
300-500 sqft 
Gas for water heating & occasional cooking 
Electricity for AC, TV, fan

assignments.description: Initializes the ConsumptionInfo Apex-defined variables for the low electricity consumption category.
assignments.name: InitializeLowElectricityConsumptionInfo
assignments.label: Initialize Low Electricity Consumption Info

value.stringValue:
Low consumption homes are 1/2 BHKs 
Regularly empty on weekdays 
300 sqft 
Appliances limited to AC, TV, fan

assignments.description: Initializes the ConsumptionInfo Apex-defined variables for the low gas consumption category.
assignments.name: InitializeLowGasConsumptionInfo
assignments.label: Initialize Low Gas Consumption Info

value.stringValue:
Low gas consumption homes are 1/2 BHKs 
Regularly unoccupied during the day 
300–500 sqft 
Limited gas use: water heating & occasional cooking only 
Likely electric heating

assignments.description: Initializes the ConsumptionInfo Apex type for the medium consumption and dual-fuel category.
assignments.name: InitializeMediumDualFuelConsumptionInfo
assignments.label: Initialize Medium Dual-Fuel Consumption Info

value.stringValue: Gas: Approx 12,000 Kwh, Electricity: Approx 3,000 kWh (2 or 3 bedrooms)
Gas: Approx 1000 Kwh, Electricity: Approx 250 kWh (2 or 3 bedrooms)

Medium dual fuel consumption homes are 2/3 BHKs 
Regularly occupied 
600-900 sqft 
Gas for central heating, water heating, and cooking 
Electricity for AC, TV, fan, fridge, washing machine

assignments.description: Initializes the ConsumptionInfo Apex-defined variables for the medium electricity consumption category.
assignments.name: InitializeMediumElectricityConsumptionInfo
assignments.label: Initialize Medium Electricity Consumption Info

value.stringValue:
Medium consumption homes are 2/3 BHKs 
Regularly occupied 
600-900 sqft 
Appliances include AC, TV, fan, fridge, washing machine

assignments.description: Initializes the ConsumptionInfo Apex-defined variables for the medium gas consumption category.
assignments.name: InitializeMediumGasConsumptionInfo
assignments.label: Initialize Medium Gas Consumption Info

value.stringValue:
Medium gas consumption homes are 2/3 BHKs 
Regularly occupied 
600–900 sqft 
Daily use of gas for central heating, water heating, and cooking 
Moderate insulation

assignments.description: Resets the selected product pricing details to select the recommended product.
assignments.name: ResetSelectedProductPricingDetails
assignments.label: Reset Selected Product Pricing Details

assignments.description: Sets the accountId variable to the value of the recordId variable.
assignments.name: SetAccountId
assignments.label: Set Account ID

assignments.description: Sets the accountId variable to the value of the Account ID from the Opportunity from GetOpportunityRecord record variable.
assignments.name: SetAccountIdFromOpportunity
assignments.label: Set Account ID from Opportunity

assignments.description: Sets AccountId to the ID of the account record selected on the Collect Customer Type screen.
assignments.name: SetAccountIdFromSelection
assignments.label: Set Account ID

assignments.description: Sets the field values for the BillingAccountObj record variable.
assignments.name: SetBillingAccountVariable
assignments.label: Set Billing Account Variable

assignments.description: Sets the billing address field values from the service address field values.
assignments.name: SetBillingAddress
assignments.label: Set Billing Address

assignments.description: Sets the contact details in the CustomerDetails Apex-defined variable.
assignments.name: SetContactDetails
assignments.label: Set Contact Details

assignments.description: Sets IsKnownCustomer to the customer type selected on the Collect Customer Type screen.
assignments.name: SetCustomerType
assignments.label: Set Customer Type

assignments.description: Sets IsKnownCustomer variable to true for known user
assignments.name: SetCustomerTypeForKnownUserOpportunityOutcome
assignments.label: Set Customer Type For Known User

assignments.description: Sets the IsKnownCustomer variable to true.
assignments.name: SetCustomerTypeToKnown
assignments.label: Set Customer Type to Known

assignments.description: Sets the parameters to pass to the backend with the data selected on the Order Summary page.
assignments.name: SetEnrollmentDetailsForNewCustomer
assignments.label: Set Enrollment Details for New Customer

assignments.description: Sets the request body for the Get Service Points by Address HTTP callout using the address fields from the Collect Unknown Customer Details screen.
assignments.name: SetHTTPCalloutInput
assignments.label: Set HTTP Callout Input

assignments.description: Sets the field values for the CustomerDetails Apex-defined variable for a known customer.
assignments.name: SetKnownCustomerDetails
assignments.label: Set Known Customer Details

assignments.description: Sets the primary contact details in the CustomerDetails Apex-defined variable.
assignments.name: SetPrimaryContactDetails
assignments.label: Set Primary Contact Details

assignments.description: Sets the SelectedPaymentMethod variable with the value from the current attribute in the loop.
assignments.name: SetSelectedPaymentMethod
assignments.label: Set Selected Payment Method

assignments.description: Sets the current flow stage to Customer Type Stage.
assignments.name: SetStageToCustomerType
assignments.label: Set Stage to Customer Type

assignments.description: Sets the current flow stage to Order Summary Stage.
assignments.name: SetStageToOrderSummary
assignments.label: Set Stage to Order Summary

assignments.description: Sets the Status field of the current service point record in the loop to Active.
assignments.name: SetStatusToActive
assignments.label: Set Status to Active

assignments.description: Sets the Status field of the current service point record in the loop to Inactive.
assignments.name: SetStatusToInactive
assignments.label: Set Status to Inactive

assignments.description: Sets the CustomerDetails variable for an unknown customer.
assignments.name: SetUnknownCustomerDetails
assignments.label: Set Unknown Customer Details

constants.description: Stores the name of the annual consumption period.
constants.name: AnnualConsumptionPeriod

constants.description: Stores the code for the catalog that contains the utility products.
constants.name: CatalogCode

constants.description: Stores the API name of the decision table that contains the catalog to category and service type mapping.
constants.name: CatalogToCategoryAndServiceTypeDTApiName

constants.description: Stores the API name of the decision table that contains the entity name and field name to attribute name mapping.
constants.name: EntityAndFieldToAttributeDTApiName

constants.description: Stores the path for the failure image. Use a static resource path for a custom image.
constants.name: FailureImage

constants.description: Stores the name of the monthly consumption period.
constants.name: MonthlyConsumptionPeriod

constants.description: Stores the code for the payment method attribute.
constants.name: PaymentMethodAttributeCode

constants.description: Stores the file path for the success image. Use a static resource path for a custom image.
constants.name: SuccessImage

decisions.description: Determines whether the service address should be copied to the billing address fields.
decisions.name: CopyServiceAddressToBillingAddress
decisions.label: Copy Service Address to Billing Address?

decisions.description: Determines whether the customer is known or new.
decisions.name: CustomerType
decisions.label: Customer Type

decisions.description: Determines whether there's an error in the selections on the Collect Customer Details screen.
decisions.name: HasCustomerSelectionError
decisions.label: Has Customer Selection Error?

decisions.description: Determines whether the current service point record in the loop has an active energy service agreement.
decisions.name: HaveActiveEnergyServiceAgreement
decisions.label: Have Active Energy Service Agreement?

decisions.description: Determines whether all required decision table records were found.
decisions.name: HaveAllDecisionTableRecords
decisions.label: Have All Decision Table Records?

decisions.description: Determines whether associated location records were found by checking if the Associated Locations from GetAssociatedLocationRecords record collection contains a record.
decisions.name: HaveAssociatedLocationRecords
decisions.label: Have Associated Location Records?

decisions.description: Determines whether the Get Best Tariffs subflow returned tariff plans.
decisions.name: HaveBestTariffs
decisions.label: Have Best Tariffs?

decisions.description: Determines whether a catalog record was found by checking if the Catalog from GetCatalog record variable has a value.
decisions.name: HaveCatalogRecord
decisions.label: Have Catalog Record?

decisions.description: Determines whether a contact record was found by checking if the Contact from GetContactForAccount record variable has a value.
decisions.name: HaveContactRecord
decisions.label: Have Contact Record?

decisions.description: Determines whether a primary contact record was found by checking if the Primary Contact from GetPrimaryContactRecordForAccount record variable has a value.
decisions.name: HavePrimaryContactRecord
decisions.label: Have Primary Contact Record?

decisions.description: Determines whether the current account billing account record in the loop is active.
decisions.name: IsBillingAccountActive
decisions.label: Is Billing Account Active?

decisions.description: Determines whether the customer was successfully enrolled.
decisions.name: IsCustomerEnrolled
decisions.label: Is Customer Enrolled?

decisions.description: Determines whether the current associated location record in the loop is active.
decisions.name: IsLocationActive
decisions.label: Is Location Active?

decisions.description: Determines whether the customer is new by checking if isKnownCustomer is false.
decisions.name: IsNewCustomer
decisions.label: Is New Customer?

decisions.description: Determines whether the current attribute in the loop is the payment method attribute.
decisions.name: IsPaymentMethodAttribute
decisions.label: Is Payment Method Attribute?

decisions.description: Determines whether the ID passed in the recordId variable is a valid account ID, a valid opportunity ID, or something else.
decisions.name: WhatTypeOfRecord
decisions.label: What Type of Record?

dynamicChoiceSets.description: BillingAccount Options to be selected by the user.
dynamicChoiceSets.name: BillingAccountOptions

dynamicChoiceSets.description: Choice List of Addresses for the customer
dynamicChoiceSets.name: ExistingCustomerAddresses

formulas.description: Stores the full name from the contact record.
formulas.name: ContactFullName

formulas.description: Stores a boolean value that indicates whether the record ID is for an account record.
formulas.name: IsAccountRecordId

formulas.description: Stores a boolean value that indicates whether the record ID is for an opportunity record.
formulas.name: IsOpportunityRecordId

formulas.description: Base formula to construct label for missing address fields
formulas.name: MissingAddressFieldsBase
formulas.expression: TRIM( IF(ISBLANK({!UnknownCustomerAddress.street}), "Street", "") & IF(ISBLANK({!UnknownCustomerAddress.city}), ", City", "") & IF(ISBLANK({!UnknownCustomerAddress.province}), ", State", "") & IF(ISBLANK({!UnknownCustomerAddress.postalCode}), ", Postal Code", "") & IF(ISBLANK({!UnknownCustomerAddress.country}), ", Country", "") )

formulas.description: Final formula to construct label for missing address fields with leading comma removed
formulas.name: MissingAddressFieldsLabel

formulas.description: Stores the full name from the primary contact record.
formulas.name: PrimaryContactFullName

loops.description: Repeats actions for each record in the AccountBillingAccounts record collection.
loops.name: IterateOverAccountBillingAccountRecords
loops.label: Iterate Over Account Billing Account Records

loops.description: Repeats actions for each associated location record in the Associated Locations from GetAssociatedLocationRecords record collection.
loops.name: IterateOverAssociatedLocationRecords
loops.label: Iterate Over Associated Location Records

loops.description: Repeats actions for each record in the PriceImpactingAttributesList record collection.
loops.name: IterateOverPriceImpactingAttributes
loops.label: Iterate Over Price-Impacting Attributes

loops.description: Repeats actions for each service point record in the Service Points from GetServicePointRecords record collection.
loops.name: IterateOverServicePointRecords
loops.label: Iterate Over Service Point Records

recordLookups.description: Gets the account billing account records associated with the account ID in the accountId variable. Stores the results in the AccountBillingAccounts record collection.
recordLookups.name: GetAccountBillingAccountRecords
recordLookups.label: Get Account Billing Account Records

recordLookups.description: Gets the account record with an ID that matches the ID in the accountId variable. Stores the result in the Account from GetAccountRecord record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetAccountRecord
recordLookups.label: Get Account Record

recordLookups.description: Gets the energy service agreement item records with an ID in the ServicePointIds collection and a Start Date less than or equal to the current date. Stores the results in the Energy Service Agreement Items from GetActiveEnergyServiceAgreementItemRecords record collection.
recordLookups.name: GetActiveEnergyServiceAgreementItemRecords
recordLookups.label: Get Active Energy Service Agreement Item Records

recordLookups.description: Gets the associated location records with a Parent Record ID that matches the ID in the accountId variable. Stores the results in the Associated Locations from GetAssociatedLocationRecords record collection.
recordLookups.name: GetAssociatedLocationRecords
recordLookups.label: Get Associated Location Records

recordLookups.description: Gets the catalog record with a catalog code that matches the catalog code passed into the flow. Stores the result in the Catalog from GetCatalog record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetCatalog
recordLookups.label: Get Catalog

recordLookups.description: Gets the decision table record with an API name that matches CatalogToCategoryAndServiceTypeDTApiName. Stores the result in the Decision Table from GetCatalogToCategoryAndServiceTypeDecisionTable record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetCatalogToCategoryAndServiceTypeDecisionTable
recordLookups.label: Get Catalog to Category and Service Type Decision Table

recordLookups.description: Gets the first contact record linked to the account ID in the accountId variable. Stores the result in the Contact from GetContactForAccount record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetContactForAccount
recordLookups.label: Get Contact Record for Account

recordLookups.description: Gets the decision table record with an API name that matches EntityAndFieldToAttributeDTApiName. Stores the result in the Decision Table from GetEntityAndFieldToAttributeDecisionTable record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetEntityAndFieldToAttributeDecisionTable
recordLookups.label: Get Entity and Field to Attribute Decision Table

recordLookups.description: Gets the opportunity record with an ID that matches the ID in the recordId variable. Stores the result in the Opportunity from GetOpportunityRecord record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetOpportunityRecord
recordLookups.label: Get Opportunity Record

recordLookups.description: Gets the primary contact record for the account. Stores the result in the Primary Contact from GetPrimaryContactRecordForAccount record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetPrimaryContactRecordForAccount
recordLookups.label: Get Primary Contact Record for Account

recordLookups.description: Gets the address record with an ID that matches the ID of the address selected on the Select Customer Address screen. Stores the result in the Address from GetSelectedAddressRecord record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetSelectedAddressRecord
recordLookups.label: Get Selected Address Record

recordLookups.description: Gets the location record associated with the selected address. Stores the result in the Location from GetSelectedLocationRecord record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetSelectedLocationRecord
recordLookups.label: Get Selected Location Record

recordLookups.description: Gets the service point records with a Location ID that matches the ID from the Location from GetSelectedLocationRecord record variable. Stores the results in the Service Points from GetServicePointRecords record collection.
recordLookups.name: GetServicePointRecords
recordLookups.label: Get Service Point Records

screens.description: Allows the user to select a service type and service points and enter consumption details and other price-impacting attributes for an address to see the best plans for the customer.
screens.name: ScreenCollectCustomerDetails
screens.label: Collect Customer Details

screens.description: Allows the flow user to specify whether the customer is new or existing. For existing customers, the user selects the account from a lookup component.
screens.name: ScreenCollectCustomerType
screens.label: Collect Customer Type

screens.description: Allows the user to enter address details for an unknown customer.
screens.name: ScreenCollectUnknownCustomerDetails
screens.label: Collect Unknown Customer Details

validationRule.errorMessage: Enter a value for required Address fields : {!MissingAddressFieldsLabel}

screens.description: Displays an error to the flow user when there's an error with the customer selection.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayCustomerSelectionError
screens.label: Display Customer Selection Error

fields.name: ErrorCustomerSelectionDisplayText
fields.fieldText: Selection is invalid. Go back and select other options to continue. Error Message: {!CustomerDetailsLWC.errorMessage}

screens.description: Displays an error to the flow user when customer enrollment fails.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayEnrollmentError
screens.label: Display Enrollment Error

fields.name: EnrollmentErrorDisplayTextHeading
fields.fieldText: We couldn’t enroll the customer. Try again.

fields.name: EnrollmentErrorDisplayTextSubHeading
fields.fieldText: Customer enrollment failed with error: {!EnrollCustomer.errorMessage}

screens.description: Displays an error to the flow user when one or more decision tables required for the tariff comparison are missing.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayErrorMissingDecisionTable
screens.label: Display Missing Decision Table Error

fields.name: ErrorMissingDecisionTableDisplayText
fields.fieldText: Tariff Comparison requires one or more decision tables. The following decision tables are missing: ({!CatalogToCategoryAndServiceTypeDTApiName}, {!EntityAndFieldToAttributeDTApiName}

screens.description: Displays an error to the flow user when a catalog record isn't found.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayErrorNoCatalog
screens.label: Display No Catalog Error

fields.name: ErrorNoCatalogDisplayText
fields.fieldText: There’s no catalog with code {!CatalogCode}

screens.description: Displays an error to the flow user when the Get Best Tariffs subflow fails.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayGetTariffsError
screens.label: Display Get Tariffs Error

fields.name: GetTariffsErrorDisplayText
fields.fieldText: Getting the best tariffs failed with an error: {!GetBestTariffs.errorMessage}

screens.description: Displays an error when the Get Service Points by Address HTTP callout fails.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayHttpCalloutError
screens.label: Display HTTP Callout Error

fields.name: HttpCalloutErrorDisplayText
fields.fieldText: HTTP Callout to External System Failed with errorCode {!GetServicePointsByAddress.responseCode}

screens.description: Displays an error to the flow user when no associated location records are found.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayNoAssociatedLocationsError
screens.label: Display No Associated Locations Error

fields.name: ErrorNoAssociatedLocationsDisplayText
fields.fieldText: No AssociatedLocations records available for the account {!GetAccountRecord.Name}

screens.description: Displays an order confirmation to the flow user.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayOrderConfirmation
screens.label: Display Order Confirmation

fields.name: OrderSubmittedDisplayTextSubHeading1
fields.fieldText: Order ID {!EnrollCustomer.orderNumber} is created

fields.name: OrderSubmittedDisplayTextSubHeading2
fields.fieldText: The customer will be contacted by the team soon.

screens.description: Allows the flow user to review the summary of the selected tariff plan before enrollment.
screens.name: ScreenDisplayOrderSummary
screens.label: Display Order Summary

validationRule.errorMessage: The service start date should be in the future.

screens.description: Allows the flow user to select an address from a list of options for a known user.
screens.name: ScreenSelectCustomerAddress
screens.label: Select Customer Address

screens.description: Allows the user to select a tariff plan from a list of plans.
screens.name: ScreenSelectPlan
screens.label: Select a Plan

fields.name: ChoosePlanAcctOrOpptyPageDisplayText
fields.fieldText: 2. Select a Tariff Plan to enroll

fields.name: ChoosePlanDisplayText
fields.fieldText: 3. Select a Tariff Plan to enroll

stages.description: Stores the label and order for stage where user chooses a Tariff Plan from a list
stages.name: ChoosePlanStage
stages.label: Select a Plan

stages.description: Stores the label and order for stage where user chooses the service type, service point, estimated consumption and other price impacting attributes e.g. Payment Method to view the best tariffs for a selected address
stages.name: CustomerDetailsStage
stages.label: Enter Customer Details

stages.description: Stores the label and order for stage where user enters the customer details
stages.name: CustomerInputStage
stages.label: Select Customer Input

stages.description: Stores the label and order for stage where user chooses the type of customer
stages.name: CustomerTypeStage
stages.label: Select Customer Type

stages.description: Stores the label and order for stage where user views the summary of order
stages.name: OrderSummaryStage
stages.label: Order Summary

subflows.description: Calls a flow that enrolls the customer in the selected tariff plan.
subflows.name: EnrollCustomer
subflows.label: Enroll Customer

subflows.description: Calls a flow that gets the tariff plans with the best pricing.
subflows.name: GetBestTariffs
subflows.label: Get Best Tariffs

textTemplates.description: Stores the formatted address from the current associated location record in the loop.
textTemplates.name: FormattedAddress

transforms.description: Maps and transforms the IDs from the Energy Service Agreement Items from GetActiveEnergyServiceAgreementItemRecords record collection to a text collection. Stores the target data in ActiveServicePointIds.
transforms.name: TransformActiveAgreementsToServicePointIdCollection
transforms.label: Transform Active Agreements to Service Point ID Collection

transforms.description: Maps and transforms fields from various sources to the CustomerDetails Apex type. Stores the target data in CustomerDetails.
transforms.name: TransformKnownCustomerDetails
transforms.label: Transform Known Customer Details

transforms.description: Maps and transforms the IDs from the Service Points from GetServicePointRecords record collection to a text collection. Stores the target data in ServicePointIds.
transforms.name: TransformServicePointsToIdCollection
transforms.label: Transform Service Points to ID Collection

transforms.description: Maps and transforms fields from unknown customer details to the CustomerDetails Apex type. Stores the target data in TransformUnknownCustomerDetails.
transforms.name: TransformUnknownCustomerDetails
transforms.label: Transform Unknown Customer Details

variables.description: Stores a collection of account billing account records associated with the customer's account.
variables.name: AccountBillingAccounts

variables.description: Stores the ID of the account record for a known customer.
variables.name: AccountId

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionInfo record for the actual usage category.
variables.name: ActualElectricityUsageConsumptionInfo

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionInfo record for the actual usage category.
variables.name: ActualGasUsageConsumptionInfo

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo record for actual electricity usage.
variables.name: ActualUsageElectricityConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionValueInfo record for electricity consumption.
variables.name: ActualUsageElectricityConsumptionValueInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionValueInfo records for electricity consumption.
variables.name: ActualUsageElectricityConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo record for actual gas usage.
variables.name: ActualUsageGasConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionValueInfo record for gas consumption.
variables.name: ActualUsageGasConsumptionValueInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionValueInfo records for gas consumption.
variables.name: ActualUsageGasConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Temporarily stores the current address record in the IterateOverAssociatedLocationRecords loop.
variables.name: AddressRecord

variables.description: Stores a collection of address records for a known customer.
variables.name: AddressRecordList

variables.description: Stores the ConsumptionPeriodInfo for the annual period, high consumption, and dual-fuel category.
variables.name: AnnualHighDualFuelConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores a list of ConsumptionValueInfo records for the annual period, high consumption, and dual-fuel category.
variables.name: AnnualHighDualFuelConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo record for the annual, high electricity consumption category.
variables.name: AnnualHighElectricityConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionValueInfo records for the annual, high electricity consumption category.
variables.name: AnnualHighElectricityConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo record for the annual, high gas consumption category.
variables.name: AnnualHighGasConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionValueInfo records for the annual, high gas consumption category.
variables.name: AnnualHighGasConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Stores the ConsumptionPeriodInfo for the annual period, low consumption, and dual-fuel category.
variables.name: AnnualLowDualFuelConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores a list of ConsumptionValueInfo records for the annual period, low consumption, and dual-fuel category.
variables.name: AnnualLowDualFuelConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo record for the annual, low electricity consumption category.
variables.name: AnnualLowElectricityConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionValueInfo records for the annual, low electricity consumption category.
variables.name: AnnualLowElectricityConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo record for the annual, low gas consumption category.
variables.name: AnnualLowGasConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionValueInfo records for the annual, low gas consumption category.
variables.name: AnnualLowGasConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Stores the ConsumptionPeriodInfo for the annual period, medium consumption, and dual-fuel category.
variables.name: AnnualMediumDualFuelConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores a list of ConsumptionValueInfo records for the annual period, medium consumption, and dual-fuel category.
variables.name: AnnualMediumDualFuelConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo record for the annual, medium electricity consumption category.
variables.name: AnnualMediumElectricityConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionValueInfo records for the annual, medium electricity consumption category.
variables.name: AnnualMediumElectricityConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo record for the annual, medium gas consumption category.
variables.name: AnnualMediumGasConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionValueInfo records for the annual, medium gas consumption category.
variables.name: AnnualMediumGasConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Temporarily stores the current billing account record in the IterateOverAccountBillingAccountRecords loop.
variables.name: BillingAccountObj

variables.description: Stores a collection of active billing account records associated with the customer's account.
variables.name: BillingAccounts

variables.description: Stores a list of ConsumptionCategory Apex type records.
variables.name: ConsumptionCategoryList

variables.description: Stores a collection of consumption period names, for example, Annual and Monthly.
variables.name: ConsumptionPeriodList

variables.description: Stores the known or unknown customer details in the CustomerDetails Apex type.
variables.name: CustomerDetails

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionCategory record for the dual-fuel category.
variables.name: DualFuelConsumptionCategory

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionCategory record for the electricity category.
variables.name: ElectricityConsumptionCategory

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionValueInfo record for the electricity service type in the annual, high consumption category.
variables.name: ElectricityServiceTypeAnnualHighElectricityConsumptionValueInfo

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionValueInfo record for the electricity service type in the annual, low consumption category.
variables.name: ElectricityServiceTypeAnnualLowElectricityConsumptionValueInfo

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionValueInfo record for the electricity service type in the annual, medium consumption category.
variables.name: ElectricityServiceTypeAnnualMediumElectricityConsumptionValueInfo

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionValueInfo record for the electricity service type in the monthly, high consumption category.
variables.name: ElectricityServiceTypeMonthlyHighElectricityConsumptionValueInfo

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionValueInfo record for the electricity service type in the monthly, low consumption category.
variables.name: ElectricityServiceTypeMonthlyLowElectricityConsumptionValueInfo

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionValueInfo record for the electricity service type in the monthly, medium consumption category.
variables.name: ElectricityServiceTypeMonthlyMediumElectricityConsumptionValueInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of service point records with an updated active or inactive status.
variables.name: FinalServicePointList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionCategory record for the gas category.
variables.name: GasConsumptionCategory

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionValueInfo record for the gas service type in the annual, high consumption category.
variables.name: GasServiceTypeAnnualHighGasConsumptionValueInfo

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionValueInfo record for the gas service type in the annual, low consumption category.
variables.name: GasServiceTypeAnnualLowGasConsumptionValueInfo

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionValueInfo record for the gas service type in the annual, medium consumption category.
variables.name: GasServiceTypeAnnualMediumGasConsumptionValueInfo

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionValueInfo record for the gas service type in the monthly, high consumption category.
variables.name: GasServiceTypeMonthlyHighGasConsumptionValueInfo

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionValueInfo record for the gas service type in the monthly, low consumption category.
variables.name: GasServiceTypeMonthlyLowGasConsumptionValueInfo

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionValueInfo record for the gas service type in the monthly, medium consumption category.
variables.name: GasServiceTypeMonthlyMediumGasConsumptionValueInfo

variables.description: Stores the request body for the Get Service Points by Address HTTP callout.
variables.name: GetServicePointsByAddressInput

variables.description: Stores a boolean value that indicates whether the customer has at least one active billing account.
variables.name: HasBillingAccount

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionInfo record for the high dual-fuel consumption category.
variables.name: HighDualFuelConsumptionInfo

variables.description: Stores a list of ConsumptionPeriodInfo records for the high consumption and dual-fuel category.
variables.name: HighDualFuelConsumptionPeriodInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionInfo record for the high electricity consumption category.
variables.name: HighElectricityConsumptionInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo records for the high electricity consumption category.
variables.name: HighElectricityConsumptionPeriodInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionInfo record for the high gas consumption category.
variables.name: HighGasConsumptionInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo records for the high gas consumption category.
variables.name: HighGasConsumptionPeriodInfoList

variables.description: Stores a boolean value that indicates whether the customer is a known customer.
variables.name: IsKnownCustomer

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionInfo record for the low dual-fuel consumption category.
variables.name: LowDualFuelConsumptionInfo

variables.description: Stores a list of ConsumptionPeriodInfo records for the low consumption and dual-fuel category.
variables.name: LowDualFuelConsumptionPeriodInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionInfo record for the low electricity consumption category.
variables.name: LowElectricityConsumptionInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo records for the low electricity consumption category.
variables.name: LowElectricityConsumptionPeriodInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionInfo record for the low gas consumption category.
variables.name: LowGasConsumptionInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo records for the low gas consumption category.
variables.name: LowGasConsumptionPeriodInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionInfo record for the medium dual-fuel consumption category.
variables.name: MediumDualFuelConsumptionInfo

variables.description: Stores a list of ConsumptionPeriodInfo records for the medium consumption and dual-fuel category.
variables.name: MediumDualFuelConsumptionPeriodInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionInfo record for the medium electricity consumption category.
variables.name: MediumElectricityConsumptionInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo records for the medium electricity consumption category.
variables.name: MediumElectricityConsumptionPeriodInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionInfo record for the medium gas consumption category.
variables.name: MediumGasConsumptionInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo records for the medium gas consumption category.
variables.name: MediumGasConsumptionPeriodInfoList

variables.description: Stores the ConsumptionPeriodInfo for the monthly period, high consumption, and dual-fuel category.
variables.name: MonthlyHighDualFuelConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores a list of ConsumptionValueInfo records for the monthly period, high consumption, and dual-fuel category.
variables.name: MonthlyHighDualFuelConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo record for the monthly, high electricity consumption category.
variables.name: MonthlyHighElectricityConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionValueInfo records for the monthly, high electricity consumption category.
variables.name: MonthlyHighElectricityConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo record for the monthly, high gas consumption category.
variables.name: MonthlyHighGasConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionValueInfo records for the monthly, high gas consumption category.
variables.name: MonthlyHighGasConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Stores the ConsumptionPeriodInfo for the monthly period, low consumption, and dual-fuel category.
variables.name: MonthlyLowDualFuelConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores a list of ConsumptionValueInfo records for the monthly period, low consumption, and dual-fuel category.
variables.name: MonthlyLowDualFuelConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo record for the monthly, low electricity consumption category.
variables.name: MonthlyLowElectricityConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionValueInfo records for the monthly, low electricity consumption category.
variables.name: MonthlyLowElectricityConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo record for the monthly, low gas consumption category.
variables.name: MonthlyLowGasConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionValueInfo records for the monthly, low gas consumption category.
variables.name: MonthlyLowGasConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Stores the ConsumptionPeriodInfo for the monthly period, medium consumption, and dual-fuel category.
variables.name: MonthlyMediumDualFuelConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores a list of ConsumptionValueInfo records for the monthly period, medium consumption, and dual-fuel category.
variables.name: MonthlyMediumDualFuelConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo record for the monthly, medium electricity consumption category.
variables.name: MonthlyMediumElectricityConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionValueInfo records for the monthly, medium electricity consumption category.
variables.name: MonthlyMediumElectricityConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Stores an Apex ConsumptionPeriodInfo record for the monthly, medium gas consumption category.
variables.name: MonthlyMediumGasConsumptionPeriodInfo

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex ConsumptionValueInfo records for the monthly, medium gas consumption category.
variables.name: MonthlyMediumGasConsumptionValueInfoList

variables.description: Stores a collection of attributes that impact pricing.
variables.name: PriceImpactingAttributesList

variables.description: Stores the ID of the record that was passed into the flow.
variables.name: recordId

variables.description: Stores the payment method selected by the user.
variables.name: SelectedPaymentMethod

variables.description: Stores the pricing details of the tariff plan selected by the user.
variables.name: SelectedProductPricingDetails
